productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Skirt
description: Composition Black knee-length skirt made of 64% polyester, 34% viscose and 2% spandex, with a comfortable fabric waist, and has a zippered and button closure on the right side Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Don that chic look in this knee-length skirt from united colors of benetton. Pair this with heeled sandals and a fancy top for casual outings, or team it with a formal shirt to turn it into an office wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in dresses Height-5.8"; Waist-26"
